## Scope

Keep this PR focused. Prefer the smallest change that solves the problem.

- [ ] One problem, or several **closely related** problems
- [ ] One feature, or several **closely related** features
- [ ] No unrelated refactors, cleanups, or drive-by edits

If the work grew beyond that scope, split it into separate PRs.
